human_task_name: SynAIpse CC1: fresh QA disproof of recommendation effects
objective: Independently attempt to disprove CC1 at the immutable committed target, with particular focus on producer-reader compatibility, unchanged invocation effects, malformed-envelope rejection, and legacy next decision producers.

decision_frame.value: Confirm the additive recommendation-effects projection has not changed the established harness next decision contract before an adversarial review is commissioned.
decision_frame.why_now: The Worker proof was preserved against a pre-commit draft; CC1 now has a distinct immutable target SHA and requires a fresh independent QA result.
acceptance_criteria: The QA result is fresh, packet-bound, and refers to target SHA 8e7e7251c299d8f7844cf633cf885bedeab2752d.
QA exercises an existing non-CC1 next producer as well as CC1 projection and malformed-envelope tests.
QA either records an assertion-shaped defect with exact evidence or an accepted disproof result with exact passing commands.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: An additive projection can silently invalidate old producers when a post-construction override leaves metadata stale; prove that all emitted CC1 envelopes remain internally coherent.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One independent QA disproof report and packet-bound result at the final committed SHA.

non_goals: Do not edit production source, tests, the commit, branch, worktree, or Worker evidence.
Do not execute any recommended command with side effects, create routes, add persistence, or change state/context schemas.
Do not push, merge, rebase, reset, stash, clean, delete, or mutate hosted state.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/commands/next-fitness-report.test.ts src/commands/next-agent-parity.test.ts src/commands/next-decision-meta.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Read the immutable CC1 target and independently run only the declared local disproof commands.
Write the declared QA artifact and result, or report a packet-bound blocker.

stop_conditions: artifact probe expiry before result write
